body.purpose: Table cells, setting values, all prose content.

label.purpose: Badge text, column headers, setting field names, status indicators.

heading.purpose: Section title in topbar. One per view.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default state-change transitions: nav hover, row hover, button hover.

motion.name: pulse-alive
motion.purpose: Server status Activity icon when connected.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Collapse sidebar to horizontal tab bar, stack toolbar vertically.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per workspace. Scan, Execute.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='14' height='14' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='11' cy='11' r='8'/><path d='m21 21-4.3-4.3'/></svg> Scan</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(0.575 0.140 170); color: oklch(0.100 0.020 175); border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 7px 13px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0,0,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.630 0.140 170); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.135 0.018 175), 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.575 0.140 170); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: wait; }

components.name: Badge — Success
components.html: Included
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: oklch(0.200 0.060 155); color: oklch(0.680 0.130 155); border-radius: 999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Badge — Warning
components.description: Needs Fix item — data quality issue, not system error.
components.html: Needs fix
components.css: .ds-badge-warning { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: oklch(0.195 0.045 60); color: oklch(0.730 0.130 60); border-radius: 999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Badge — Secondary
components.description: Excluded or media type label. Neutral, low-emphasis.
components.css: .ds-badge-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: oklch(0.230 0.018 175); color: oklch(0.750 0.012 165); border-radius: 999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Artist name editor inside plan table rows.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 34px; width: 100%; max-width: 240px; background: oklch(0.210 0.016 175); color: oklch(0.935 0.006 155); border: 1px solid oklch(0.265 0.018 175); border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 10px; font-size: 13px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0,0,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0,0,1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.595 0.012 165); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.575 0.140 170); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.575 0.140 170 / 0.25); } .ds-input.warning { border-color: oklch(0.195 0.045 60 / 0.8); background: oklch(0.175 0.030 60); }

components.name: Server Status
components.description: Health indicator in topbar. Pulses when connected.
components.html: Server
components.css: @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.4} } .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; border: 1px solid oklch(0.265 0.018 175); color: oklch(0.595 0.012 165); background: oklch(0.210 0.016 175); } .ds-status--ok { border-color: oklch(0.380 0.080 155); color: oklch(0.680 0.130 155); background: oklch(0.175 0.045 155); } .ds-status--ok svg { animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; }

narrative.overview:
A tool so well-calibrated that the interface disappears. Every element earns its pixel the way an aircraft instrument earns its dial: legible under pressure, unambiguous under any lighting condition, with nothing present that doesn't directly serve the pilot.

The palette is deep teal-black, descended from the existing brand without apologizing for the darkness. This is a personal NAS tool used in the evening while a download batch finishes; the ambient light is low, the user is focused, and a white dashboard would be the wrong choice for both the physical context and the psychological register.

This system explicitly rejects: generic SaaS purple gradients and hero aesthetics; Bootstrap admin panels with their blue sidebars and heavy table borders; the hacker terminal aesthetic (green-on-black, monospace everywhere, designed to look cool rather than work well).
keyCharacteristics: Deep teal-black base with single vivid teal accent
Single typeface (Inter), tuned by weight and letter-spacing
Flat tonal layering for depth — no shadows
Motion only on state change (150ms ease-out-quart)

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Signal Teal appears on ≤10% of any given screen. One primary button, one active nav item. Its scarcity is the point.

rules.name: The No-Zero Rule
rules.body: Never use oklch(0 0 0) black or oklch(1 0 0) white. All neutrals carry chroma ≥0.005 toward the teal hue family.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Numbers in data cells always use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: No second typeface. Weight, size, and letter-spacing do all the work.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on any resting surface. Hover states shift background color, not elevation.

dos: Do use Signal Teal exclusively for primary actions, active states, and focus rings.
Do use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on any column containing numbers.
Do express depth through lightness increments in the teal family.
Do keep all transitions at 150ms with cubic-bezier(0.25, 0, 0, 1).
Do use Amber Caution (not Fault Red) for data quality warnings.
donts: Don't use purple gradients, hero CTAs, or generic SaaS patterns.
Don't use Bootstrap-style heavy blue sidebars or oversized nav elements.
Don't use green-on-black or monospace-everywhere terminal aesthetics.
Don't add box-shadow to resting surfaces.
Don't use border-left or border-right as a colored accent stripe.
Don't animate page loads or section changes.
